projects.description: A RAG-powered legal research platform for exploring Indian laws, constitutional rights, and government regulations with AI-powered search and citations.
projects.fullDescription: Legislative AI of India is an intelligent legal research platform that leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide accurate, citation-backed answers from official Indian legislative documents. Designed for lawyers, students, and citizens, it enables semantic search across laws, constitutional provisions, and government regulations using natural language queries. The platform supports multilingual interactions, context compression for optimized AI responses, PDF export functionality, and a fully responsive user interface. Built with React, TypeScript, Flask, and advanced AI models including Google Gemini and Groq, it delivers a fast, reliable, and user-friendly legal research experience.
projects.title: Legislative AI of India

projects.description: An AI-powered platform designed to identify, analyze, and address challenges in slum communities through data-driven insights and smart urban planning.
projects.fullDescription: SlumSense is an innovative smart-city solution developed to improve living conditions in underserved urban communities. The platform leverages data analytics, mapping technologies, and AI-driven insights to identify infrastructure gaps, sanitation issues, resource shortages, and other critical challenges faced by slum residents. By providing actionable recommendations and visualized data, SlumSense helps policymakers, NGOs, and local authorities make informed decisions for sustainable urban development. The project was showcased during the HackShastra SnowHackIPEC Grand Finale, demonstrating problem-solving, teamwork, and technology-driven social impact.
projects.title: SlumSense

projects.description: A weather-risk prediction platform that helps users plan trips by analyzing climate conditions and forecasting environmental risks for any location and date.
projects.fullDescription: AtmosAPI is a climate intelligence platform designed to help travelers, adventurers, and outdoor enthusiasts make informed decisions before their journeys. By leveraging Earth-observation data and historical climate datasets, the platform predicts the likelihood of extreme weather conditions, including excessive heat, cold, wind, rainfall, and overall discomfort. Users can simply enter a location and date to receive detailed risk assessments, visual indicators, and actionable insights. With its responsive interface, global coverage, and fast data processing, AtmosAPI provides a reliable way to plan adventures with confidence while minimizing weather-related uncertainties.
projects.title: AtmosAPI
